nasb.text: Then the king commanded, and they quarried great stones, costly stones, to lay the foundation of the house with cut stones.

esv.text: At the king’s command they quarried out great, costly stones in order to lay the foundation of the house with dressed stones.

cnv.text: 王下令，人就開鑿出又大又貴重的石頭，用鑿好的石頭作殿的地基。

ccb.text: 他们按照王的命令在山上凿出珍贵的巨石，用来作殿的根基。
